text: Order dessert first.
Sit somewhere you have never sat before.
Ask for the bartender's favorite drink.
Take the scenic route, even if it is not faster.
Wear the louder shirt.
Let someone else pick your next drink.
Start a toast for no particular reason.
Say yes to the harmless thing you almost skipped.
Take a ridiculous vacation photo.
Order something because the name made you laugh.
Find the weirdest decor item nearby.
Ask someone in your group to invent a fake vacation tradition.
Give your current drink an unnecessarily dramatic name.
Pretend you are reviewing the pool chairs professionally.
Declare one snack the official snack of the day.
Make a tiny plan, then immediately improve it with nonsense.
Find the best background for a dramatic duck photo.
Use the phrase 'for vacation science' to justify one harmless decision.
Invent a fake resort award and give it to someone.
Let the duck decide.  You know which duck.
